title: Welcoming a Foster Kitten into Our Apartment

all.en: My wife had been talking about fostering a kitten ever since she saw a flyer at the vet clinic.
all.zh: 自從我太太在獸醫診所看到一張傳單之後，她就一直在談論要寄養一隻小貓。

all.en: I was hesitant because our apartment is small and our two children already keep us very busy.
all.zh: 我有些猶豫，因為我們的公寓很小，而且兩個孩子已經讓我們忙得不可開交。

all.en: Still, when she showed me a photo of a tiny gray kitten with one missing eye, I gave in.
all.zh: 不過，當她給我看一張少了一隻眼睛的小灰貓照片時，我還是心軟答應了。

all.en: The animal shelter volunteer warned us that this kitten had been very shy with previous foster families.
all.zh: 動物收容所的志工警告我們，這隻小貓在之前幾個寄養家庭都非常怕生。

all.en: We named her Misty because her one eye was the color of fog over a mountain lake.
all.zh: 我們把她取名叫迷霧，因為她那隻眼睛的顏色就像山中湖泊上的霧。

all.en: Before bringing her home, we spent a Saturday afternoon kitten-proofing our entire living room.
all.zh: 在把她帶回家之前，我們用了一個星期六的下午把整個客廳布置成適合小貓的環境。

all.en: We hid loose cables behind heavy furniture and removed small objects from the lower bookshelves.
all.zh: 我們把鬆散的電線藏到沉重的家具後面，並從下層書架上拿走了所有小物品。

all.en: Our son, who is seven, built her a tiny cardboard castle from an old shoebox and packing tape.
all.zh: 我們七歲的兒子用一個舊鞋盒和封箱膠帶為她做了一座小小的紙箱城堡。

all.en: Our four-year-old daughter spent the entire morning drawing pictures of cats on welcome banners.
all.zh: 我們四歲的女兒則花了整個早上在歡迎布條上畫滿了貓咪。

all.en: When Misty arrived in a tall blue carrier, she immediately ran under the couch and refused to come out.
all.zh: 當迷霧裝在高高的藍色提籠裡到達時，她立刻鑽進沙發底下，怎麼樣都不肯出來。

all.en: For the first three days, the only proof she existed was an empty food bowl every morning.
all.zh: 頭三天裡，唯一能證明她存在的就是每天早上空掉的飼料碗。

all.en: My daughter was heartbroken and asked if Misty would ever come out to play with her.
all.zh: 女兒非常傷心，問迷霧到底會不會出來和她一起玩。

all.en: I told her some friendships need patience, just like the kind we build with shy classmates.
all.zh: 我告訴她有些友誼需要耐心，就像我們和害羞同學建立友誼的過程一樣。

all.en: On the fourth night, my son left his stuffed bear near the couch as a peace offering.
all.zh: 到了第四天晚上，兒子把他的玩具熊放在沙發旁邊，當作和平的禮物。

all.en: By morning, the bear had been dragged a few inches and rested against a small fluffy gray ball.
all.zh: 到了早上，那隻熊被拖了幾公分，緊緊靠著一團毛茸茸的灰色小毛球。

all.en: Misty had finally fallen asleep against the bear, and she did not run away when we came near.
all.zh: 迷霧終於靠著玩具熊睡著了，而且我們靠近時她也沒有逃跑。

all.en: From that morning on, she came out a little earlier and stayed in the open a little longer.
all.zh: 從那天早上開始，她一天比一天早出來，停留在外面的時間也越來越長。

all.en: My wife discovered that Misty loved being brushed gently with a soft baby hairbrush after dinner.
all.zh: 我太太發現迷霧很喜歡晚飯後被一支柔軟的嬰兒髮梳輕輕地刷毛。

all.en: Within two weeks, Misty was sleeping on my daughter's pillow and purring like a small motor.
all.zh: 不到兩個星期，迷霧就睡在女兒的枕頭上，呼嚕呼嚕地叫得像一個小馬達。

all.en: She still flinched at sudden noises, but she no longer hid when the doorbell rang.
all.zh: 她仍然會因為突然的聲響而縮一下，但門鈴響的時候她已經不再躲起來了。

all.en: Our son took on the responsibility of cleaning her litter box every Tuesday and Friday evening.
all.zh: 兒子主動負起每週二和週五晚上清理貓砂盆的責任。

all.en: He even made a chart on the fridge to track her food, water, and play sessions.
all.zh: 他甚至在冰箱上做了一張表格，用來記錄她的飲食、飲水和遊戲時間。

all.en: Three weeks in, the shelter called to say a family wanted to adopt Misty permanently.
all.zh: 三個星期後，收容所打電話來說有一個家庭想要正式領養迷霧。

all.en: My wife went very quiet, and the kids both burst into tears at the dining table.
all.zh: 我太太頓時沉默不語，兩個孩子則在餐桌邊放聲大哭起來。

all.en: We had known this day might come, but the reality was much harder than the idea.
all.zh: 我們早就知道這一天可能會來，但現實比想像中要難受得多。

all.en: I sat down with the children and explained what fostering really means in plain language.
all.zh: 我和孩子們坐下來，用簡單的語言解釋了寄養真正的意義。

all.en: We had agreed to give Misty a soft landing, not a forever home, and she was now ready.
all.zh: 我們當初答應給迷霧一個溫柔的中繼站，而不是永遠的家，現在她已經準備好了。

all.en: That night, my daughter wrote a long letter to Misty's new family, asking them to brush her gently.
all.zh: 那天晚上，女兒寫了一封很長的信給迷霧的新家人，請他們要溫柔地幫她梳毛。

all.en: My son drew a detailed map showing Misty's favorite hiding spots and her preferred sleeping positions.
all.zh: 兒子則畫了一張詳細的地圖，標示出迷霧最愛的藏身處和她喜歡的睡姿。

all.en: On the day of the adoption, we packed her toys, her brush, and even the stuffed bear.
all.zh: 領養那天，我們把她的玩具、梳子，甚至那隻玩具熊都打包好了。

all.en: The new family turned out to be a kind older couple whose own cat had recently passed away.
all.zh: 新家人原來是一對親切的老夫妻，他們自家的貓不久前才剛過世。

all.en: When they met Misty, she walked right up to the woman and bumped her head against her hand.
all.zh: 當他們見到迷霧時，她直接走向那位太太，用頭蹭了一下她的手。

all.en: Watching them drive away with Misty was painful, but somehow it also felt strangely right.
all.zh: 看著他們載著迷霧離開很難受，但同時又有種奇妙的踏實感。

all.en: Two months later, the older couple sent us a photo of Misty curled up on a sunny windowsill.
all.zh: 兩個月後，那對老夫妻寄來一張迷霧蜷在灑滿陽光窗台上的照片。

all.en: My daughter taped the photo above her bed and whispered that we should foster another kitten soon.
all.zh: 女兒把那張照片貼在床頭上方，並輕聲說我們應該很快再寄養另一隻小貓。

all.en: The following month, the shelter called again about a pair of black kittens needing temporary care.
all.zh: 下個月，收容所再次來電，提到有一對黑色小貓需要臨時照顧。

all.en: We talked it over as a family during Saturday breakfast and unanimously agreed to take them.
all.zh: 我們在週六早餐時以家庭討論方式商議，最後一致同意接下牠們。

all.en: The kittens were sister and brother, and we named them Pepper and Ink the moment they arrived.
all.zh: 這對小貓是姊弟，牠們一到家我們就立刻取名為胡椒與墨水。

all.en: Pepper was bold from minute one and pounced on every shoelace within her field of vision.
all.zh: 胡椒從第一分鐘起就大膽無比，視線內的每根鞋帶她都會撲過去。

all.en: Ink, by contrast, hid behind the curtain for two full days, watching us with wide curious eyes.
all.zh: 相較之下，墨水躲在窗簾後整整兩天，用又大又好奇的眼睛觀察著我們。

all.en: My son taught my daughter how to play with feather toys without scaring the shy black kitten.
all.zh: 兒子教女兒如何使用羽毛玩具，又不會嚇到那隻害羞的黑色小貓。

all.en: My wife joked that our small apartment had quietly become an unofficial neighborhood kitten halfway house.
all.zh: 太太開玩笑說我們的小公寓已悄悄變成了社區裡非正式的小貓中途之家。

all.en: On weekends, our children invited friends over to gently meet the kittens and learn animal care.
all.zh: 週末時，孩子們邀請朋友到家裡溫柔地認識小貓，並學習照顧動物的方法。

all.en: I began to understand that fostering teaches kids a quieter, deeper kind of lasting kindness.
all.zh: 我開始明白，寄養能讓孩子學會一種更安靜、更深刻、能持久的善意。

all.en: Each goodbye still hurts, but every photo we receive afterward makes the whole journey worthwhile.
all.zh: 每一次的告別仍會心痛，但事後收到的每張照片都讓整段旅程變得值得。

all.en: Pepper and Ink stayed with us for almost six weeks before finding their forever homes together.
all.zh: 胡椒和墨水在我們家住了將近六週，才一起找到永遠的家。

all.en: A young family with twin girls fell in love with both kittens the moment they met them.
all.zh: 一個有雙胞胎女兒的年輕家庭一見到兩隻小貓就深深愛上了。

all.en: The twins promised to send us monthly photos and to always brush the kittens at bedtime.
all.zh: 雙胞胎承諾每個月會傳照片給我們，並且每晚睡前都會幫小貓梳毛。

all.en: Our son cried that night but proudly hung the new family's address on his bedroom corkboard.
all.zh: 那晚兒子哭了，但驕傲地把新家人的地址貼在臥室的軟木佈告板上。

all.en: Over the next two years, we fostered eleven more kittens of every color and personality.
all.zh: 在接下來的兩年裡，我們又寄養了十一隻各種顏色和個性的小貓。

all.en: Each kitten taught our children new lessons about patience, responsibility, and the courage to let go.
all.zh: 每隻小貓都教會我們的孩子關於耐心、責任以及放手勇氣的新功課。

all.en: My wife eventually became a registered volunteer trainer for new foster families in our district.
all.zh: 我太太後來成為我們區內新寄養家庭的註冊志工培訓師。

all.en: She hosted monthly orientation sessions in our small living room, full of curious nervous newcomers.
all.zh: 她每個月在我們的小客廳舉辦說明會，房間裡擠滿了好奇又緊張的新手。

all.en: Our children helped by sharing their own simple tips for comforting frightened or hidden kittens.
all.zh: 我們的孩子也來幫忙，分享他們自己用來安撫害怕或躲藏小貓的簡單小撇步。

all.en: Looking back, that first shy gray kitten named Misty had quietly changed the path of our whole family.
all.zh: 回顧過去，那隻名叫迷霧的害羞灰色小貓，悄悄改變了我們全家人生的軌跡。

all.en: My wife eventually trained as a certified animal behaviorist and now consults for the city's main shelter.
all.zh: 我太太後來考取了動物行為師資格，現在擔任市立收容所的顧問。

all.en: Our son chose veterinary medicine for his university major after fostering kittens throughout high school.
all.zh: 我們的兒子在整個高中時期都參與寄養小貓的工作，後來大學選擇了獸醫系。

all.en: Our daughter, now ten years old, draws careful portraits of every foster kitten in her sketchbook.
all.zh: 我們十歲的女兒會在素描本中為每一隻寄養小貓畫下細緻的肖像。

all.en: She gives each new family a framed portrait alongside the adoption paperwork as a personal welcome.
all.zh: 她會把一張裱框的肖像連同領養文件一起送給每一個新家庭，作為私人的迎接禮物。

all.en: We converted our spare bedroom into a small permanent kitten care nursery with cozy hiding spots.
all.zh: 我們把備用臥室改造成一間小型的永久性貓咪育嬰室，裡面布置了舒適的躲藏角落。

all.en: Misty's first family stayed in touch and still sends us photos on her birthday every single year.
all.zh: 迷霧的第一個家庭一直保持聯繫，每年迷霧生日都會傳照片給我們。

all.en: She turned twelve years old this past spring and still sleeps on a sunny windowsill every afternoon.
all.zh: 她今年春天剛滿十二歲，仍然每天下午都睡在灑滿陽光的窗台上。

all.en: Our family eventually adopted one calm older cat ourselves, a soft tabby we named Marshmallow.
all.zh: 我們家最終也領養了一隻安靜的老貓，是一隻柔軟的虎斑，取名為棉花糖。

all.en: Marshmallow tolerates every new foster kitten with great patience, becoming our quiet senior helper.
all.zh: 棉花糖以極大的耐心對待每一隻新來的寄養小貓，成了我們家安靜的資深助手。

all.en: Sometimes I sit on the floor watching Marshmallow groom a tiny new arrival and feel deeply grateful.
all.zh: 有時候我坐在地板上看著棉花糖為剛來的新小貓理毛，內心湧起深深的感激。
